title: Twist2 Fresh Frozen
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5imsb","text":"Immunofluorescence protocol for Twist2 staining of fresh frozen mouse tissue.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Thaw slides, dry for 30 mins. Pap and label.
Incubate primary Anti-Twist2 antibody Abcam Catalog #ab66031 (RRID: AB_2211862) 1:500 in 1% BSA Overnight 4 °C
Incubate secondary Alexa Fluor® 488 AffiniPure™ Goat Anti-Rabbit IgG (H L) Jackson ImmunoResearch Laboratories, Inc. Catalog #111-545-003 (RRID: AB_2338046) 1:1000 and DAPI 1:1000 in 1% BSA.
Mount with aqueous mounting media. Image within 2 days.
creator: Griffen Wakelin
